name: Audio Wave Visualization
description: Beautiful audio wave visualization with multiple frequency bands

AudioWave.code: function AudioWave(props) { const width = props.layerSize.width; const height = props.layerSize.height; const numBars = 80; const bars = []; const centerY = height / 2; for (let i = 0; i < numBars; i++) { const x = (i / numBars) * width; const freq = Math.sin(props.frame * 0.1 + i * 0.3) * 0.5 + 0.5; const freq2 = Math.sin(props.frame * 0.15 + i * 0.2 + 1) * 0.3 + 0.3; const barHeight = (freq * 150 + freq2 * 100) * (1 + Math.sin(props.frame * 0.05) * 0.3); const barWidth = width / numBars * 0.8; const hue = (i / numBars * 60 + props.frame) % 360; const color = 'hsl(' + hue + ', 100%, 60%)'; const gradient = 'linear-gradient(to top, ' + props.color1 + ', ' + props.color2 + ')'; bars.push(React.createElement('rect', { key: 'bar-' + i, x: x, y: centerY - barHeight / 2, width: barWidth, height: barHeight, fill: color, rx: 2, opacity: 0.8 })); bars.push(React.createElement('rect', { key: 'reflect-' + i, x: x, y: centerY + barHeight / 2, width: barWidth, height: barHeight * 0.5, fill: color, rx: 2, opacity: 0.2, transform: 'scale(1, -1) translate(0, -' + height + ')' })); } return React.createElement('svg', { width: width, height: height, style: { filter: 'blur(0.5px)' } }, ...bars); }
AudioWave.description: Animated audio wave bars with reflection

CircularSpectrum.code: function CircularSpectrum(props) { const centerX = props.layerSize.width / 2; const centerY = props.layerSize.height / 2; const numBars = 60; const radius = 180; const bars = []; for (let i = 0; i < numBars; i++) { const angle = (i / numBars) * Math.PI * 2; const freq = Math.sin(props.frame * 0.12 + i * 0.4) * 0.5 + 0.5; const length = freq * 120 + 40; const x1 = centerX + Math.cos(angle) * radius; const y1 = centerY + Math.sin(angle) * radius; const x2 = centerX + Math.cos(angle) * (radius + length); const y2 = centerY + Math.sin(angle) * (radius + length); const hue = (i / numBars * 360 + props.frame * 2) % 360; const color = 'hsl(' + hue + ', 100%, 65%)'; bars.push(React.createElement('line', { key: i, x1: x1, y1: y1, x2: x2, y2: y2, stroke: color, strokeWidth: 4, strokeLinecap: 'round', opacity: 0.8 })); } return React.createElement('svg', { width: props.layerSize.width, height: props.layerSize.height, style: { filter: 'blur(1px)' } }, React.createElement('circle', { cx: centerX, cy: centerY, r: radius - 10, fill: 'none', stroke: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)', strokeWidth: 2 }), ...bars, React.createElement('circle', { cx: centerX, cy: centerY, r: 20, fill: 'radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.8), rgba(255,255,255,0))', opacity: 0.6 })); }

PulsingText.code: function PulsingText(props) { const scale = 1 + Math.sin(props.frame * 0.08) * 0.05; const opacity = 0.9 + Math.sin(props.frame * 0.12) * 0.1; return React.createElement('div', { style: { fontSize: props.fontSize || '48px', fontWeight: 'bold', color: props.color || '#ffffff', textAlign: 'center', transform: 'scale(' + scale + ')', opacity: opacity, textShadow: '0 0 20px rgba(255, 0, 255, 0.5), 0 0 40px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.3)', letterSpacing: '4px' } }, props.text); }
